sections.paragraph:
Original: נגד נגיד

Transliteration: nâgı̂yd nâgid

Phonetic: naw-gheed'

BDB Definition:

  1. leader, ruler, captain, prince
    1. ruler, prince
    2. prince-overseer
    3. ruler (in other capacities)
    4. princely things

Origin: from H5046

TWOT entry: 1289b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
